title: sideroxylon celastrinum
intro: Sideroxylon celastrinum, also known as the Blackthorn or Black Olive tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Sapotaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideroxylon celastrinum include relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as used in traditional folk remedies and homeopathic preparations.
